title: SSO login outage after IdP certificate rotation
description: Authentication outage triggered by a certificate rotation issue in the IAM path, causing SAML validation failures and downstream login disruption.
symptoms: Users cannot log in after IAM certificate update; SAML validation fails; MFA may also fail for some tenants
remediation_steps: Re-issue intermediate certificate, restart IAM gateway pods, flush SAML token cache
root_cause_summary: Expired or mismatched certificate chain breaks SAML assertion validation

title: MFA provider outage causing push verification failure
description: Users can authenticate with primary credentials but fail during MFA because push verification requests time out or never arrive.
symptoms: Users can enter credentials but MFA push requests fail or time out
remediation_steps: Switch to fallback MFA channel, validate provider health, notify help desk
root_cause_summary: Third-party MFA provider outage or callback failure

title: DNS resolution failure after network routing change
description: Intermittent endpoint resolution failures after a routing or resolver path change, leading to partial service degradation.
symptoms: Applications intermittently fail to resolve service endpoints after route change
remediation_steps: Rollback route change, flush DNS caches, validate resolver path
root_cause_summary: Resolver path or route change causing partial DNS failure

title: Ingress outage after WAF policy change
description: A WAF or ingress rule update blocks legitimate production traffic and makes the public application unavailable.
symptoms: Public application traffic fails after WAF or ingress rule update
remediation_steps: Revert WAF rule set, validate ingress controller config, check edge logs
root_cause_summary: Misconfigured edge policy is blocking legitimate production traffic

title: Payment API degradation due to expired secret
description: Downstream payment requests fail because a required API secret or authorization token has expired.
symptoms: Payment processing calls fail after secret or token expiration
remediation_steps: Rotate payment secret, restart dependent services, replay failed requests if safe
root_cause_summary: Expired downstream secret breaks payment API authorization

title: Slack webhook failure due to token revocation
description: Slack notifications stop posting because the integration token was revoked or the app lost required scopes.
symptoms: Slack notifications stop posting after token is revoked or app is disconnected
remediation_steps: Reconnect Slack integration, validate scopes, rotate webhook configuration
root_cause_summary: Integration token revoked or scopes no longer valid

title: Privileged admin misuse causing forced MFA resets and anomalous tenant lockouts
description: A privileged support or admin workflow is misused, causing forced MFA resets, session churn, and cross-tenant authentication disruption.
symptoms: Multiple tenants report forced MFA resets, anomalous login failures, and suspicious admin activity after a privileged session
remediation_steps: Disable suspicious admin client, revoke active sessions, freeze privileged workflow, review affected tenants
root_cause_summary: Misuse of a privileged workflow or admin client caused broad authentication disruption and forced MFA reset behavior

title: Application config drift after service port change
description: A production outage occurs when the application service port changes but the corresponding network policy or firewall rule is not updated to match.
symptoms: Customer portal requests time out after service moves from port 80 to port 81 while network policy still permits only port 80
remediation_steps: Update application configuration to use the intended service port, then update the network policy repository to permit inbound traffic on the same port
root_cause_summary: Application and network policy drifted out of sync after a port change
